title: Man accused of murder with hockey stick makes first court appearance
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -   Xolani Manzi, accused of the 30-year-old Siphosethu Mdletshe’s murder, made his first appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Monday 15 December, following his arrest on Saturday 13 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Xolani Manzi, accused of the 30-year-old Siphosethu Mdletshe’s murder, made his first appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Monday 15 December, following his arrest on Saturday 13 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Mdletshe was beaten with a hockey stick in Dadoo Street, KwaNonqaba, and the Mossel Bay medical personnel have since declared him dead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Manzi will make his next court appearance on Monday 22 December.","html":"Manzi will make his next court appearance on Monday 22 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Man beaten to death, suspect arrested"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man accused of murder with hockey stick makes first court appearance
